name: Tex-Mex Steak and Tortillas
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a very hot charcoal fire. 2. Grill about 6 individual steaks (each about 1/2-in. thick). Blend the corn oil, garlic, and vinegar in a flat dish. Add the steaks, turning to coat well. Set aside.
3. Core the tomatoes and cut into 1/4-in. cubes. Add onion, chilies, coriander, remaining garlic, and vinegar to the tomato mixture; blend well. Set sauce aside.
4. Place about 4 slices of steak on the hot grill for 1 minute or less (to desired doneness). Heat tortillas briefly on the grill just to warm through—do not overheat.
5. Place one piece of cooked steak in the center of a warm tortilla, spoon sauce over the meat, and fold the sides of the tortilla over the ends to enclose the meat. Eat like a sandwich.
